const submit = () => { const errors = validate(data); /* ... */ };

v2_mid_level.code:
// Validate on every change
const onChange = (field, value) => { setData(...); setErrors(validate({...data, [field]: value})); };

v4_staff.code:
// onTouched - first blur shows error, then onChange clears
const form = useForm({ mode: 'onTouched' });
